title: Range join over timestamp results in TypeException 'algebra.bandjoin'
poc: create table bug (time timestamp, val int);
select t1.time, count(t2.val) from bug t1, bug t2 where t2.time between (t1.time - interval '1' second) and (t1.time + interval '1' second) group by t1.time order by t1.time;
key_bug_features: Range join over timestamp causing TypeException
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE bug (time TIMESTAMP, val INT, description VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO bug VALUES (current_timestamp + interval '2' second, 2, 'Second entry');
INSERT INTO bug VALUES (current_timestamp - interval '3' second, 3, 'Third entry');
SELECT t1.time, COUNT(t2.val) FROM bug t1, bug t2 WHERE t2.time BETWEEN (t1.time - interval '1' second) AND (t1.time + interval '1' second) GROUP BY t1.time ORDER BY t1.time;
